description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:boron Docker image with a cache on node_modules/. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm install, caches node_modules/, stores the node_modules/ directory as an artifact that expires in one week, and runs on runners tagged docker and shared. In the test stage add a test job that runs apt-get update -q -y, installs libnss3 and libgconf-2-4, sets CHROME_DEB and CHROME_URL variables, downloads and installs Google Chrome, installs chromedriver@2.36.0 and the gitlab-selenium-server globally via npm, starts chromedriver and the selenium server in the background, runs npm test, then fetches Selenium logs into a selenium/ directory and uploads that directory as an always‑available artifact, defines GITLAB_TARGET_SELENIUM_REMOTE_URL and SELENIUM_REMOTE_URL variables, and runs on runners tagged docker and shared.
